ground_truth.title: Best Long-Distance & Cross-Country Moving Companies 2026
ground_truth.author: Rebecca Edwards
ground_truth.main_content: We've spent nearly a decade researching and testing long-distance movers to find companies that deliver fair pricing, reliable service, and fewer moving-day surprises. Allied Van Lines is our top overall pick, with strong alternatives like Colonial Van Lines, United Van Lines, American Van Lines, and Mayzlin for different budgets and priorities. Want a faster answer? Use our Find-a-Mover tool to compare personalized estimates from the movers that best fit your move. Allied Van Lines stands out for its convenience, offering virtual in-home estimates and being one of the few moving companies that doesn't require a deposit.
